title: LightForge -- The Journey: Building Diamonds With Light
description: Light-field / non-photochemical laser-induced nucleation (NPLIN) models calibrated against real glycine data (Javid et al. 2016, Cryst. Growth Des.), including the honest negative result of the light-field nucleation-bias hypothesis test against that data. Also includes a diamond CVD fabrication-time model grounded in published UV-assisted growth (Lu et al. 2017, Light: Sci. Appl.) and femtosecond-laser seeding/defect-correction literature, projecting a novel but untested combination of confirmed techniques. Author also known as IACONOUS WORTHYSON.
